falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff top would invalidate the HOLD signal by confirming extreme overbought conditions

falsification_conditions.condition: Price breaks above $30,000 (key resistance from bottom_2024_aug pattern) with >20% volume confirmation
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A decisive breakout would contradict the pattern's bearish implications and prove the HOLD wrong

falsification_conditions.condition: 14-day moving average crosses above 50-day MA by >5% with volume surge (>200% of 30-day average)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A confirmed bullish trend reversal would directly contradict the current HOLD/UNKNOWN verdict

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
